title: Unique Paths II
input_format: A 2D integer array `obstacleGrid` where `0` is empty and `1` is an obstacle.
output_format: The number of unique paths from top-left to bottom-right, avoiding obstacles.
constraints:
- `m == obstacleGrid.length`
- `n == obstacleGrid[i].length`
- `1 <= m, n <= 100`
- `obstacleGrid[i][j]` is `0` or `1`.
